rulings.Rulings: DEFENDANT DEERE & COMPANY'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT -- O F F C A L E N D A R on 3 occasions the court has requested courtesy copies from movant and movant has failed to comply with the courts directive. (REQ/302)

rulings.Rulings: PETITIONER EVANS BROTHERS, INC.'S MOTION On First Amended Petition For Writ Of Mandate -- Deny, failure to sustain burden - Substantial Evidence Standard applies. 1) Substantial evidence shows DBE good faith requirement is met. 2) Contract doesn't require SSPC Certificate.
